name: Golf
dek: a game for the long run
blurb: A sport I can see myself playing well into old age. The technical skill and the discipline it demands genuinely amaze me. Amateur, three years in, and hooked.

name: Cars
blurb: No one in the family was into cars. I found it on my own, and it stuck. The garage, so far:

name: Vintage watches
dek: the hunt as much as the piece
blurb: I love the process of sourcing as much as the wearing. Part collector, part student of the market, viewing the right pieces through an investment lens.

name: Photography
blurb: Amateur, but aspiring. I started taking it seriously in May 2026. Memories have always been priceless to me, and photography is how I hold on to the moments that matter. Shooting on a Sony RX100 VII.

name: Menswear
blurb: Classic menswear, the timeless end of it. I've worked with around fifteen of the best bespoke tailors in the world, from England to Italy to Hong Kong, shirtmakers and coatmakers alike. Currently favouring:

name: Crypto
blurb: I write about crypto from the inside — the things I learned the expensive way, and where I think this is all heading.

name: Food
blurb: Food crawls, hole-in-the-wall spots, and the full Michelin run. I keep a working list and short notes.

link.text: The full log lives on Beli

name: Bodybuilding
blurb: Ten years of lifting. Counting macros, progressive overload, showing up. The most reliable teacher of discipline I've found.
